name: database-visualization-design-tool
description: 专业的工业级数据库设计工具，支持可视化设计、关系管理和DDL导出

scripts.install:all: cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd client && npm run dev" "cd server && npm run dev"
scripts.build: cd client && npm run build && cd ../server && npm run build

author: Assistant
